grant_and_term.grant: Non-exclusive license to use the System at specified location
grant_and_term.re_licensing: At franchisor's sole discretion, materially different terms possible

fee_obligations.royalty: 5% of Gross Rooms Revenue, monthly by 15th
fee_obligations.program_fee: 4% of GRR, may increase up to +1% over term
fee_obligations.electronic_funds_transfer: Franchisor may require all payments via wire/EFT at franchisee's cost
fee_obligations.offset_right: Franchisor may reduce any payment or credit by amounts owed

training_obligations.gm_training: Within 90 days of start date, virtual
training_obligations.brand_conference: Annual, mandatory for GM and director of sales
training_obligations.replacement_training: If GM leaves, replacement must complete training within 90 days

operational_obligations.standards_compliance: Must comply with Manual and all Standards, which can be changed unilaterally
operational_obligations.quality_assurance: Periodic inspections, Stay Score assessments, Service Quality Improvement Program
operational_obligations.insurance: Must maintain required insurance per Manual; franchisor may purchase on franchisee's behalf if not maintained
operational_obligations.data_ownership: All guest data and hotel information is franchisor's property

non_curable_key: Repeated non-compliance within 24 months (even if cured)
3 notices of material default in 12 months (regardless of cure)

interim_remedies.description: Upon default notice, franchisor may impose interim remedies without termination
measures: Charge costs of suspension/disabling plus intervention fees
Revoke financial accommodations (fee discounts, ramps, waivers)

transfer_restrictions.permitted_transfers: No change of control. Some without notice (public equity, minority <50%, institutional funds). Others with 60-day notice + consent + $5,500 fee.
transfer_restrictions.change_of_ownership: $175,000 fee, 60-day notice, current FA, PIP, background check, guaranty
transfer_restrictions.competitor_restriction: Cannot transfer to Competitor or Sanctioned Person
transfer_restrictions.right_of_first_refusal: None, but must notify franchisor of intent to market equity

noncompete.during_term: Cannot own or be licensor/franchisor of competing brand
noncompete.management_company: Cannot be exclusive manager for Competitor

guaranty.scope: Each required guarantor (may include spouse) must sign Guaranty assuming certain FA obligations
guaranty.additional_guaranty: May be required as condition for lender comfort letter, certain loans, or upon written notice of default

liquidated_damages.post_opening_under_2_years: Greater of (Hotel's or System's Avg Monthly Royalty) x 60
liquidated_damages.last_60_months: Hotel's Avg Monthly Royalty x remaining months
liquidated_damages.measurement_period: 24 months for Hotel's Avg, 12 months for System's Avg
liquidated_damages.exclusions: Temporary financial accommodations and Business Interruptions excluded from calculations

dispute_resolution.governing_law: New York (without choice of law principles)
dispute_resolution.venue: E.D. Virginia (Alexandria) or Fairfax County, VA or New York, NY
dispute_resolution.franchisor_venue_option: May sue where hotel is located

indemnification.scope: Broad — all losses, costs, liabilities, damages, claims, expenses from: any FA breach, any act/omission of franchisee, any occurrence at hotel, IP infringement, contract/law violations, any business at hotel site, sanctions non-compliance, fees/costs charged to guests
indemnification.exception: Not required to indemnify where damages solely result of indemnified party's gross negligence or willful misconduct (per final non-appealable judgment). Exception does not apply to vicarious/secondary liability theories.
indemnification.defense_obligation: Franchisor may elect franchisee to defend at franchisee's expense

force_majeure.description: Referenced in termination provisions. 5+ day non-operation excused if due to Force Majeure and reasonable steps taken to minimize impact. Casualty provisions allow 18-month rebuild period.

general_release.scope: Broad release of all claims existing on or before Effective Date. Excludes claims related to representations in franchise disclosure document.
general_release.state_overrides: Multiple states limit or void this provision

insurance.requirement: Must maintain insurance per Manual specifications
insurance.franchisor_purchase_right: If franchisee fails to obtain/maintain, franchisor may purchase on franchisee's behalf and charge actual cost

interest_rate.rate: 18% per annum or maximum lawful rate, whichever is lower
interest_rate.trigger: Any sum owed to franchisor that is overdue

distinctive_clauses.confidentiality_of_negotiated_terms: FA Section 16.18 — Negotiated terms are confidential
distinctive_clauses.no_agency: Franchisee is independent contractor. No partnership, joint venture, or employment relationship.
distinctive_clauses.economic_conditions_not_defense: Economic downturn or financial inability is not a defense to breach
distinctive_clauses.consent_standard: Franchisor may withhold consent in business judgment considering long-term System interests. Franchisee's sole remedy for unreasonably withheld consent is specific performance or declaratory judgment — no money damages.
distinctive_clauses.attorneys_fees: Prevailing party entitled to reasonable fees, expert fees, costs
